name: api_missing_field
description: Add user profile API endpoint that returns user details including email
acceptance_criteria: API endpoint GET /api/users/:id must return user profile data
Response must include user email field
API must return 200 status for valid user IDs

implementation.test_output:
All tests passed

  1 test passed, 0 failed

  UserControllerTest
    ✓ returns 200 status for valid user ID (45ms)
implementation.git_diff_summary: Added GET /api/users/:id endpoint that returns user name and ID

issue: The API endpoint was implemented and tests pass (checking for 200 status), but the User schema does not have an email field. The response returns {id, name} but NOT {id, name, email}. Tests only validate status code, not response schema. This is a deterministic failure - the email field cannot be returned because it doesn't exist in the schema.
notes: This fixture guarantees the Foreman encounters a partially-correct state regardless of LLM non-determinism. Tests pass but acceptance criterion #2 ('Response must include user email field') is impossible to satisfy with the current implementation.
